predicate.title: Metrics dashboard: visualize lead/cycle time on GitHub Pages
predicate.problem: Metrics exist as a CLI table and job summary — findable only by people who know where to look. Owner directive: visualize them in a human- and GitHub-understandable way.
acceptance_criteria: metrics.py --html renders a self-contained dashboard (grouped lead/cycle bars, median tiles, table view, light+dark, validated palette)
The metrics workflow deploys it to GitHub Pages on every push to main
The dashboard URL is discoverable from the README and a reference node
